member.name: T:Agilent.CommandExpert.ScpiNet.Ag3466x_2_08.Ag3466x
member.summary: 3446x Series Digital Multimeters.

member.name: P:Agilent.CommandExpert.ScpiNet.Ag3466x_2_08.SCPI.SCPIClass.ABORt
member.summary: Aborts a measurement in progress.

member.name: P:Agilent.CommandExpert.ScpiNet.Ag3466x_2_08.SCPI.SCPIClass.CONFigure
member.summary: The query returns a quoted string indicating the present function, range, and resolution.

member.name: P:Agilent.CommandExpert.ScpiNet.Ag3466x_2_08.SCPI.SCPIClass.FETCh
member.summary: The query waits for measurements to complete and copies all available measurements to the instrument's output buffer.

member.name: P:Agilent.CommandExpert.ScpiNet.Ag3466x_2_08.SCPI.SCPIClass.R
member.summary: The query reads and erases all available measurements from the reading memory up to the specified <max_readings>.

member.name: P:Agilent.CommandExpert.ScpiNet.Ag3466x_2_08.SCPI.SCPIClass.READ
member.summary: The query starts a new sets of measurements, waits for all measurements to complete, and transfers all available measurements.

member.name: P:Agilent.CommandExpert.ScpiNet.Ag3466x_2_08.SCPI.SCPIClass.CAL
member.summary: Peforms autocalibration (autocal) and returns the result.

member.name: P:Agilent.CommandExpert.ScpiNet.Ag3466x_2_08.SCPI.SCPIClass.CLS
member.summary: Clears the event registers in all register groups.

member.name: P:Agilent.CommandExpert.ScpiNet.Ag3466x_2_08.SCPI.SCPIClass.ESE
member.summary: Enables bits in the enable register for the Standard Event Register group.

member.name: P:Agilent.CommandExpert.ScpiNet.Ag3466x_2_08.SCPI.SCPIClass.ESR
member.summary: Queries the event register for the Standard Event Register group.

member.name: P:Agilent.CommandExpert.ScpiNet.Ag3466x_2_08.SCPI.SCPIClass.IDN
member.summary: Returns the instrument’s identification string.

member.name: P:Agilent.CommandExpert.ScpiNet.Ag3466x_2_08.SCPI.SCPIClass.LRN
member.summary: Returns an ASCII string of all of the commands required to put the instrument into its current state.

member.name: P:Agilent.CommandExpert.ScpiNet.Ag3466x_2_08.SCPI.SCPIClass.OPC
member.summary: Sets "Operation Complete" (bit 0) in the Standard Event register at the completion of the current operation. Returns 1 to the output buffer after all pending commands complete.

member.name: P:Agilent.CommandExpert.ScpiNet.Ag3466x_2_08.SCPI.SCPIClass.OPT
member.summary: Returns a string identifying any installed options.

member.name: P:Agilent.CommandExpert.ScpiNet.Ag3466x_2_08.SCPI.SCPIClass.PSC
member.summary: Enables (1) or disables (0) the clearing of certain enable registers at power on.

member.name: P:Agilent.CommandExpert.ScpiNet.Ag3466x_2_08.SCPI.SCPIClass.RCL
member.summary: This command recalls the instrument state from, the state file STATE_<n>.sta in the root folder of the internal flash file system.

member.name: P:Agilent.CommandExpert.ScpiNet.Ag3466x_2_08.SCPI.SCPIClass.RST
member.summary: Resets instrument to factory default state.

member.name: P:Agilent.CommandExpert.ScpiNet.Ag3466x_2_08.SCPI.SCPIClass.SAV
member.summary: Stores the current instrument state to the state file STATE_<n>.sta in the root folder of the internal flash file system, where <n> is the number specified.

member.name: P:Agilent.CommandExpert.ScpiNet.Ag3466x_2_08.SCPI.SCPIClass.SRE
member.summary: Enables bits in the enable register for the Status Byte Register group.

member.name: P:Agilent.CommandExpert.ScpiNet.Ag3466x_2_08.SCPI.SCPIClass.STB
member.summary: Queries the condition register for the Status Byte Register group and returns a decimal value equal to the binary-weighted sum of all bits set in the register.

member.name: P:Agilent.CommandExpert.ScpiNet.Ag3466x_2_08.SCPI.SCPIClass.TRG
member.summary: Triggers the instrument if TRIGger:SOURce BUS is selected.

member.name: P:Agilent.CommandExpert.ScpiNet.Ag3466x_2_08.SCPI.SCPIClass.TST
member.summary: Performs a basic self-test of the instrument and returns a pass/fail indication.

member.name: P:Agilent.CommandExpert.ScpiNet.Ag3466x_2_08.SCPI.SCPIClass.WAI
member.summary: Configures the instrument's output buffer to wait for all pending operations to complete before executing any additional commands over the interface.

member.name: P:Agilent.CommandExpert.ScpiNet.Ag3466x_2_08.Transport.TransportClass.DefaultTimeout
member.summary:
DefaultTimeout specifies the timeout, in milliseconds, for queries issued to this instrument.
A timeout will occur if there is no response from the instrument within the specified duration.
A value of -1 is used to specify no timeout.

member.name: P:Agilent.CommandExpert.ScpiNet.Ag3466x_2_08.Transport.TransportClass.ErrorQueryBehavior
member.summary:
ErrorQueryBehavior specifies whether Command Expert automatically retrieves errors from the instrument's SCPI error queue by sending SYST:ERR? queries. Command Expert displays errors retrieved from the SCPI error queue in the Results column of the Sequence pane.
The supported values for ErrorQueryBehavior are:
None - SYST:ERR? queries will not be automatically sent.
ErrorQueryPerCommand - a :SYST:ERR? query will be sent after each command, and after each query that times out.
ErrorQueryPerCommandAndQuery - a :SYST:ERR? query will be sent after each command and after each query.

member.name: P:Agilent.CommandExpert.ScpiNet.Ag3466x_2_08.Transport.TransportClass.OpcBehavior
member.summary:
OpcBehavior specifies whether Command Expert automatically sends a *OPC? query after each command.
The supported values for OpcBehavior are:
None - *OPC? queries will not be automatically sent to the instrument.
OpcPerCommand - an *OPC? query will be sent after every command, and no further commands or queries will be sent until the *OPC? returns.

member.name: P:Agilent.CommandExpert.ScpiNet.Ag3466x_2_08.Transport.TransportClass.OmitDefaultKeywords
member.summary: OmitDefaultKeywords specifies whether to omit default keywords when sending SCPI commands.

member.name: P:Agilent.CommandExpert.ScpiNet.Ag3466x_2_08.Transport.TransportClass.UseShortFormKeywords
member.summary: UseShortFormKeywords specifies whether to use the short form of SPCI keywords when sending SCPI commands.

member.name: P:Agilent.CommandExpert.ScpiNet.Ag3466x_2_08.Transport.TransportClass.IgnoredErrors
member.summary:
IgnoredErrors is a string that specifies the list of SCPI error codes that will be ignored during execution.
For example, setting IgnoredErrors to the string "1:100,301:400" specifies that error codes from 1 to 100 inclusive and 301 to 400 inclusive will be ignored.
When setting IgnoredErrors, the input string should contain a list of zero or more items, separated by commas. Each item is either an integer, or a range of the form X:Y where X and Y are integers. The integers can be positive, 0, or negative.

member.name: P:Agilent.CommandExpert.ScpiNet.Ag3466x_2_08.Transport.TransportClass.AddToIgnoredErrors
member.summary:
AddToIgnoredErrors adds the specified error codes to IgnoredErrors (the list of SCPI error codes ignored during execution).
For example, invoking AddToIgnoredErrors with the string "1:100,301:400" will add the error codes from 1 to 100 inclusive and 301 to 400 inclusive.
When invoking AddToIgnoredErrors, the input string should contain a list of zero or more items, separated by commas. Each item is either an integer, or a range of the form X:Y where X and Y are integers. The integers can be positive, 0, or negative.

member.name: P:Agilent.CommandExpert.ScpiNet.Ag3466x_2_08.Transport.TransportClass.RemoveFromIgnoredErrors
member.summary:
RemoveFromIgnoredErrors removes the specified error codes from IgnoredErrors (the list of SCPI error codes ignored during execution).
For example, invoking RemoveFromIgnoredErrors with the string "1:100,301:400" will remove the error codes from 1 to 100 inclusive and 301 to 400 inclusive.
When invoking RemoveFromIgnoredErrors, the input string should contain a list of zero or more items, separated by commas. Each item is either an integer, or a range of the form X:Y where X and Y are integers. The integers can be positive, 0, or negative.

member.name: P:Agilent.CommandExpert.ScpiNet.Ag3466x_2_08.Transport.TransportClass.Command
member.summary: Sends a SCPI command that does not return a response from the instrument. Use the transport resource Query if the instrument returns a response.

member.summary: Sends a SCPI query string directly to the instrument and returns the result.
